description: Add allow_time_extension to battle settings UI in lobby
context:
Beads description:
Add a checkbox in the battle settings section of the lobby page.

## File: src/routes/(style)/(menu)/lobby/[id]/+page.svelte

## UI Requirements
- Checkbox labeled 'Allow time extension' or 'Referee can extend time'
- Tooltip/help text explaining behavior
- Only visible to battle creator (ref bd-5s2 for visibility logic)
- Default checked (matches schema default)

## Implementation
- Use existing battle settings pattern in lobby
- Update battle via Zero mutation when toggled
- Bind to battle.allow_time_extension field

## Acceptance Criteria
- Checkbox appears in battle settings
- Toggling updates the battle record
- State persists on page reload
- Good UX with clear labeling
